entities.description: As a subsection of 'Mechanical Dimensions', this section provides detailed information about the physical dimensions and structural specifications of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board.
Refers to the physical dimensions and structural specifications of the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, as outlined in section 4.

relations.description: The concept of '机械尺寸' (mechanical dimensions) is the primary topic of section 4.
